summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact marks the shard as not a dedupe cluster and reports no security-sensitive hydrated items. Twenty hydrated open PRs are kept independent for maintainer review; five listed candidates were not present in the compacted preflight item matrix, so live updated_at could not be copied for them.
